arts.ttl: Ethan Nwaneri on cusp of breaking Kylian Mbappe's Champions League record
arts.sum: Ethan Nwaneri is looking to break one of Kylian Mbappe's Champions League records when Arsenal face PSV.

arts.ttl: Arsenal man talks up specific transfer again despite club slowing down efforts
arts.sum: On February 5th, Albert Sambi Lokonga stated he would like to continue at Sevilla, after joining them on loan from Arsenal last summer. The La Liga club reportedly have a €12m purchase option. Four days ago, we covered claims from Spain that Sevilla have slowed down their efforts to retain the midfielder because they have concerns The post Arsenal man talks up specific transfer again despite club slowing down efforts appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could be without seven players after PSV as UEFA disciplinary threat looms
arts.sum: Arsenal have several members of their squad at risk of missing a potential Champions League quarter-final going into their clash against PSV Eindhoven. It also means that Timber, Sterling and Martinelli would have to get through the next three matches in order to avoid being handed a one-game suspension in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Merse says Arsenal would rather face Atletico than Real Madrid - is he right?
arts.sum: Paul Merson believes his former club Arsenal would be better off facing Atletico Madrid than Real Madrid in the Champions League quarter-finals - do you agree?

arts.ttl: Inside Raheem Sterling's Arsenal struggles and relationship change with Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling has endured a difficult time of things after swapping Chelsea for Arsenal in the summer and it appears that his relationship with Mikel Arteta has changed over the past few months

arts.ttl: Revealed: Arsenal & Chelsea believe they can sign €80m-rated star for just €50m
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are both keeping a close eye on Sporting Lisbon defender Ousmane Diomande ahead of this summer, CaughtOffside understands. The talented young Ivory Coast international has long been on the radar of several top clubs around Europe, and it’s currently Arsenal and Chelsea showing the strongest interest in him. Sources with a close […] The post Revealed: Arsenal & Chelsea believe they can sign €80m-rated star for just €50m appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal sign one of ‘three best in the world’
arts.sum: Arsenal are hiring one of the three best sporting directors in the world in Andrea Berta. The Gunners have been searching for a new sporting director since Edu’s resignation in November 2024, and they identified Berta as the top candidate for the role following his immense spell at Atletico Madrid.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice sends clear Arsenal message as Mikel Arteta makes Raheem Sterling decision
arts.sum: Declan Rice has fired a three-word message ahead of Arsenal's match against PSV Eindhoven in the second leg of the Champions League round of 16. Arteta said: "It's unique but it's also understanding how the game was played a week ago and the fact everything went in the right direction for us from the beginning .

arts.ttl: 'That's my dream' - William Saliba reveals personal ambition amid Real Madrid links
arts.sum: William Saliba is widely regarded as one of the best centre-backs in world football.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Barcelona or Man United? Which club leads the race for Espanyol goalkeeper Joan Garcia?
arts.sum: Arsenal are allegedly at the head of the queue for Espanyol goalkeeper Joan Garcia, but both Manchester United and Barcelona are also said to be interested.
